item.title: Cloud provider POLL_INTERVAL_MS inconsistent: AWS uses 10s, others use 5s
item.intent: All cloud providers poll at the same interval. CLOUD_POLL_INTERVAL_MS is defined once in config/defaults.ts — no inline duplicates.
item.description: src/cloud/provisioning/providers/aws.ts:47 sets POLL_INTERVAL_MS = 10_000 while hetzner.ts, gcp.ts, and digitalocean.ts all use 5_000. No documented reason for AWS to poll half as frequently. All four providers define this constant inline rather than importing from config/defaults.ts. Steps: (1) add CLOUD_POLL_INTERVAL_MS = 5_000 to config/defaults.ts; (2) grep all provider files for POLL_INTERVAL_MS; (3) replace four inline constants with import from defaults; (4) run cloud/provisioning tests.
acceptanceCriteria: All four provider files import CLOUD_POLL_INTERVAL_MS from config/defaults.ts
No inline POLL_INTERVAL_MS literals remain in provider files
AWS provisioning polls at 5s matching other providers
cloud/provisioning tests pass with no regression
